case_title: DAN BOREEN VS. CONNER, ROBERT & BETTY FAMILY TRUST et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF AS TO EL SINETTI, JOSEPH DBA 19TH AVENUE 76 #2 BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-22-2009 AT 3:30PM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOREEN, DAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONNER, ROBERT & BETTY FAMILY TRUST $2,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $61.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,261.00, DEFENDANT JOSEPH EL SINETTI, IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (JUDGMENT DEBTOR(S) PAID JUDGMENT THROUGH COURT) AS TO DEFENDANT CONNER, ROBERT & BETTY FAMILY TRUST

COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF BOREEN, DAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-22-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-22-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. NAMED DEFENDANTS ARE NOT PRESENT IN COURT. DAVID L. VANN, A REPRESENTATIVE FOR CONOCO PHILLIPS IS PRESENT ON DEFENDANTS BEHALF. DAVID L. VANN STATES THAT CONOCO PHILLIPS LEASES THE PROPERTY TO DEFENDANTS WHERE ACCIDENT HAPPENED. (GAS STATION). DAVID L. VANN SIGNS A DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE AND ALSO A STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER. DAVID L. VANN STATES THAT CONOCO PHILLIPS LEGAL DEPARTMENT ADVISED DEFENDANTS NOT TO APPEAR TODAY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506). PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED (LAF, 4-29-09)
